assertions.title: Fresh-clone setup guidance reaches executable validation commands

steps.action: Read README fresh-clone setup guidance and confirm it points browser smoke validation to http://127.0.0.1:3001.
steps.expected: Guidance documents the approved local port and route smoke target.
steps.observed: README documents pnpm dev:smoke and names http://127.0.0.1:3001 as the browser validation target.

steps.action: Open the public home route at http://127.0.0.1:3001/ in an isolated browser session.
steps.observed: Home page loaded with title 'The Old School House | Pub & Restaurant in Stony Stratford'.

steps.action: Open the documented public routes /menu, /book, /events, and /find-us on the approved port.
steps.expected: Each route renders successfully without blocking UI failures.
steps.observed: All four routes rendered successfully with route-specific page titles and visible content.

steps.action: Check browser errors and captured network activity during the route smoke flow.
steps.expected: No console/page errors and successful local document requests for the public routes.
steps.observed: No browser errors were reported; network logs showed successful GET document requests for /, /menu, /book, /events, and /find-us on 127.0.0.1:3001.

evidence.network: Successful GET document requests observed for http://127.0.0.1:3001/, /menu, /book, /events, and /find-us in the shared local app session.

frictions.description: The referenced shared guidance file ~/.factory/library/user-testing.md was not present in this environment.
frictions.resolution: Used the mission AGENTS guidance plus the parent task's Browser surface instructions to stay within the assigned boundary.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-CROSS-001 passed. README guidance aligned with the approved 127.0.0.1:3001 browser target, and the public routes /, /menu, /book, /events, and /find-us all rendered successfully in the assigned local app instance.
